allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises Lovable as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: Lovable is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Lovable is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: Lovable — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: Neither model names Lovable's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: Lovable is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: Lovable offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: Lovable is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

allGaps.description: Both models describe Lovable as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: Lovable is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Lovable is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Lovable doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add a NotThis section listing features the product deliberately does not ship.

evidence.chatgptSays: Lovable includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
evidence.claudeSays: Lovable is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
evidence.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.

product.name: Lovable
product.description: Lovable — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.

headline.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Lovable doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
headline.chatgptSays: Lovable includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
headline.claudeSays: Lovable is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
headline.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.
